name: debate_sessions
description: One row per task submitted for deliberation. Tracks the full lifecycle of a PANCHAI debate from submission through verdict.

columns.name: client_id
columns.description: Which enterprise client submitted this task

columns.name: user_goal
columns.description: Extracted user's desired outcome (set by goal_strip)

columns.name: stripped_task
columns.description: Facts-only version of the task (set by goal_strip)

columns.name: council_size
columns.description: Number of agents on the deliberation council

columns.name: task_context
columns.description: Additional context or data for the task
